interface.name: PS_C_ParticipantPicker
interface.definition: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_multipleDropdownField_v1"( label: a!defaultValue(value: ri!label, default: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:4d45002c-836c-4e02-95f4-03631802dbb1"), placeholder: a!defaultValue(value: ri!placeholder, default: #"urn:appian:translation-string:v1:2418dc70-4faf-42fb-bf55-902f59f26c9b"), value: if(a!isNullOrEmpty(ri!participantIds),null,ri!participantIds), saveInto: ri!participantIds, choiceLabels: #"_a-0000ee0e-a4b3-8000-9bf2-011c48011c48_1546843"(user: fv!data[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/02011db0-86ad-4cf2-bf76-8358c5fd0dc2"]), choiceValues: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/cdeaab86-f2b7-4659-8893-494922e7e85a", data: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_recordData"( recordType: #"urn:appian:record-type:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe", filters: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryLogicalExpression"( ignoreFiltersWithEmptyValues: true, operator: "AND", filters: { #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"( field: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/cce64326-22d6-4079-a39f-cb5e0292e234", operator: "=", value: ri!prisonId ), #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_queryFilter"( field: #"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/cdeaab86-f2b7-4659-8893-494922e7e85a", operator: "not in", value: property(ri!participantsAndInmates,"participants",null)[#"urn:appian:record-field:v1:3854eb39-6a61-48cd-82b6-e4645b2900fe/cdeaab86-f2b7-4659-8893-494922e7e85a"], applyWhen: a!isNotNullOrEmpty(property(ri!participantsAndInmates,"participants",null)) ) } ) ) )
